items.title: How the Narrative for Home Depot Is Shifting Amid Mixed Analyst Signals
items.description: Home Depot’s stock price target has seen a modest decrease, dropping from $437.81 to $433.12 as recent analyst commentary reflects a nuanced outlook for the company. Analysts cite improving sales trends and potential for growth if interest rates fall; however, concerns persist regarding the strength and pace of a sector rebound. Stay tuned to discover how you can follow future shifts in the Home Depot stock narrative as market dynamics continue to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

items.title: Values that Pfizer and Delta CEOs draw on for great leadership
items.description: At Yahoo Finance Invest 2025, Albert Bourla and Ed Bastian shared the values that helped them lead companies through crisis.
